info.name: text-insert
info.text: They grow and develop Slowly, but surely.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Ideas will grow and develop slowly, but surely.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: Soil is what helps plants grow.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Minds are like fertile soil, helping ideas grow.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: Ideas need to be watered, nurtured, and fed.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Ideas need to be watered, nurtured, and fed in order to grow into real solutions.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: It takes time and patience to grow an idea.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Time and patience are like fertilizer and water,  helping ideas to grow.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: A new idea might grow from a small seed.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: new idea might grow from a small seed.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: A new idea is like a small seed, it doesn't seem like much at first but it can grow into a whole tree if given time.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Without strong roots, good ideas will die.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: If ideas aren't properly pruned and shaped, they can become wild and out of control.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: Some will thrive and some will die, but the idea will always grow.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Some will thrive and some will die, but a good idea properly cultivated will always grow.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: Every idea needs water to grow.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Every seed of an idea needs water to grow into a real plant.

info.name: text-insert
info.text: Ideas start off small and grow with time.

info.text: Good ideas often start off small and grow with time.
